wins_analysis: No wins today. Zero trades executed as both pending SELL orders were not filled — price did not retrace up to the supply zone entry levels during the session, which is common in strong selloffs where price gaps down and continues lower without retracement.
losses_analysis: No losses today. The core issue is zero execution: in a -2.3% trending down day, placing limit sell orders at supply zones above current price assumes a retracement that never came. The strategy correctly identified direction but entry mechanism failed to adapt to momentum-driven moves.
regime_impact: The strong downtrend regime correctly filtered out BUY setups, which was appropriate. However, the regime hurt execution because in a -2.3% crash day, prices typically don't retrace to supply zones — they waterfall. The limit-order-at-zone approach is better suited for mild trending or ranging regimes, not crash days.

improvements.action: When Nifty drops > 1.5% intraday AND ADX > 22, switch SELL entries from limit-at-zone to breakout entries (sell below prior 15min low or VWAP) instead of waiting for retracement to supply zones
improvements.reason: Both RELIANCE and BAJFINANCE SELL orders went unfilled because price never retraced to supply zone entries during the strong selloff — missed the entire move

improvements.action: Lower the min_zone_score threshold from 75 to 68 for SELL setups when regime is trending_down with ADX >= 25, since trend alignment compensates for weaker zone scores
improvements.reason: RELIANCE had 10/10 trend alignment but was flagged as sub-threshold on zone_score, creating hesitation. In a strong trend, alignment matters more than zone perfection

improvements.action: Add a market-order fallback rule: if a pending SELL order is unfilled after 60 minutes AND price is already 0.5%+ below entry level AND still trending down, enter at market with tighter SL (0.4% instead of 0.67%)
improvements.reason: Today's setups were directionally correct but mechanically missed. A time-based fallback would have captured the move on RELIANCE which likely trended lower all day

improvements.action: Expand scan to include momentum-short candidates (stocks breaking below 20-day low with volume > 1.5x average) on crash days, not just zone-based setups
improvements.reason: Only 3 setups found across Nifty 50 on a -2.3% day is too few — the scan is too restrictive for momentum-driven regimes. Breakdown patterns would have generated more actionable shorts

improvements.action: Remove the BAJFINANCE BUY setup (rank 3) from order placement entirely — it contradicts the regime filter that explicitly disables BUY setups in strong downtrends
improvements.reason: A BUY order was placed for BAJFINANCE at ₹865.70 despite the regime note stating 'BUY setups are disabled entirely.' This is a logic bug that could result in counter-trend losses

tomorrow_focus: If downtrend continues (watch for gap-down open or Nifty below 21,800), use breakout-short entries on high-ADX stocks rather than limit orders at supply zones; if bounce develops, wait for first 30min range confirmation before acting.

symbol_notes.RELIANCE.NS: Strong trend alignment (10/10) in downtrend — if it opens flat or with mild gap-up tomorrow, the ₹1,349 supply zone becomes a high-probability short entry on retracement; if gap-down continues, use breakdown entry below today's low
symbol_notes.BAJFINANCE.NS: Weak zone score and contradictory BUY/SELL signals suggest avoid unless one clear level emerges; watch ₹865 as potential support bounce only if regime shifts to neutral
